name: Adherent's Pendant
description: A consecrated pendant sealed to the followers of some forgotten deity .
dropLocation: The Chamber of Raiyum, treasure chamber chest

name: Alchemist's Pendant
description:
House Cannith alchemists often wear charms such as this to ward against the
deadly materials they work with. It also boosts the wearer's ability to utilize
his or her energy more efficiently.
dropLocation: Blown to Bits, end chests including the optional one for destroying all the crates

name: Amber Pendant
description: This fragment of amber was almost lost to time.
dropLocation: Needle in a Fey Stack, End Chest

name: Amulet of Inner Focus
description: This simple amulet radiates a sense of inner peace.
dropLocation: Heyton's Rest, End reward

name: Amulet of Natural Armor
description: This magical amulet increases the natural armor of its wearer by 1.
dropLocation: Special event items, DDO:Stormreach Pre Order Purchase Bonus Item

name: Amulet of the Brute
description: This simple amulet is said to toughen its wielder at a cost.
dropLocation: Heyton's Rest, End reward

name: Amulet of the Makers
description:
The Dwarf blacksmiths who wear these gleaming amulets are regarded as masters
of their craft. As you drape it across your neck, you feel a surge of motivation
to create, better and more than any smith before you.
dropLocation: Records of the Past, end chest

name: Amulet of the Stormreaver
description:
This amulet once hung around the neck of the Stormreaver, messiah of the Xen'drik
giants. Every inch is covered with cryptic glyphs that presumably describe
the Stormreaver Prophecy in great detail.
dropLocation: The Reaver's Fate, Raid Warded chest

name: Anchorchain
description:
A small anchor adorns the end of this chain, looped around your neck. It's too
small to weigh down any serious boat.
dropLocation: Rest for the Night, end chest

name: Anger's Gift
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a fierce barbarian.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Arcane Necklace
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a clever archmage.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Archivist's Necklace
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a mighty sorcerer.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Azure Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, Raid Warded chest

name: Baron Aubrecker's Family Amulet
description:
The power this amulet confers appears to be of a much higher quality than the
amulet itself.
dropLocation: Ends and Means, end chest

name: Beads of Winter
description: Each bead on this necklace is chilling to the touch.
dropLocation: A Light in the Attic, end chest

name: Beholder Optic Nerves
description:
This necklace is fashioned from the optic nerves of a beholder. Wearing this
necklace grants increased visual acuity. The optic nerves can also absorb a
limited amount of aberrant beholder energy. The necklace will absorb any spell
like effects cast by beholders for a limited time. After absorbing a limited
number of spells some time is required to bleed off the energy before the necklace
can once again perform this warding function.
dropLocation: Invaders!, end chest (only if Boktar is the end boss)

name: Bellow's Ring
description:
This humongous ring appears to have once been placed in Bellow's nose. After
a thorough cleaning, you think that you might be able to fit it around your
neck.
dropLocation: Come Out and Slay, Bellow's Chest

name: Black Dynamo
description: This small obsidian device on a long chain hums softly.
dropLocation: Zoo Creeper, end chest

name: Blademark Amulet
description:
The Lord of Blades has left his mark on these pendants, meant to protect his
most loyal followers and devotees.
dropLocation: The Bark and the Blade, End chest

name: Bluefire Necklace
description: Soft blue pearls have been strung along a fire red strand.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, Cinnis ' chest

name: Breath of Vitality
description: Unparalleled life.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Cannith Crafted Necklace
description: This is a Cannith crafted necklace.

name: Celestial Insignia
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Winter Court Necklace 

This Celestial pendant seems to glow with holy light.
dropLocation: The Feywild, Feytwisted chests

name: Certainty
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Chains
description: Oppression will always fail, just as chains will always be broken.
dropLocation: Slave Pits of the Undercity, Small chest

name: Chaosmancer's Pendant
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Choker of the Silver Tongue
description: This thin silver necklace enhances its user's bluff and diplomacy skills.
dropLocation: Tempest's Spine, Fire and Ice chest

name: Climber's Remembrance
description:
On donning this necklace, you remember a murder most foul, the determination
of vengeance, the gleam of armor, and a fatal uphill climb.
dropLocation: The Wish, end chest (rare)

name: Cloven Jaw War Beads
description:
A thick string of carved decorative beads given to a prestigious hobgoblin captains
to give them a boost to staying power in battle.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Cobalt Pocketwatch
description: As this rests on your chest, its ticking seems to synchronize with your heartbeat.
dropLocation: Hunter and Hunted, any chest

name: Conduit of the Soul
description: Tap directly into your heart.
dropLocation: House of Pain, end chest

name: Connor's Pendant
description:
Connor, the Deep Wood Sniper, possessed this simple cord and wood necklace.
It is said to be enchanted by a spirit of the same forest Connor called home.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Cracked Core
description: It appears the crack is not a defect.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, End chest

name: Cranium Sphere
description: A small sphere with a miniature brain inside it, at the end of a long necklace.
dropLocation: The Wizard's Labyrinth, end chest

name: Creation Forge Gorget
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Crimson Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, warded chest

name: Crystal Prism
description:
When swung on its silver chain, this glass crystal has a calming effect on its
viewer.
dropLocation: The Abandoned Excavation, End reward

name: Dark Diversion
description: Shh... close your eyes. There's nobody here. Nothing to fea-
dropLocation: Temple of the Deathwyrm, raid chest

name: Dawn's Herald-Charm
description: With this around your neck, you can finally rest in peace.
dropLocation: Death House, end chest

name: Death's Locket (historic)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: The Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest

name: Death's Locket (Level 12)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: The Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Death's Locket (Level 13)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: The Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest (Heroic Hard)

name: Death's Locket (Level 14)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: The Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest (Heroic Elite)

name: Death's Locket (Level 23)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: Return to Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest (Epic Normal); Return to Gianthold, quest chain end reward

name: Death's Locket (Level 24)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: Return to Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest (Epic Hard)

name: Death's Locket (Level 25)
description:
This locket consists of the bones of several small mammals strung together with
a small skull weighing them down. The side of the skull is hinged and opens
to reveal some unknown thing's ashes.
dropLocation: Return to Prison of the Planes, Dolurrh room's chest (Epic Elite)

name: Devoted Necklace
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a devout cleric.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Dinosaur Bone Necklace
description: Fashioned of intricately carved bones of long-forgotten Dinosaurs.
dropLocation: The Isle of Dread, any legendary chest; or Dread saga legendary end reward

name: Doctor LeRoux's Curious Implant
description:
This is an intricate mechanical heart that oozes a black, oily liquid. It's
possible to channel magical energies through it...but at what cost? LeRoux's
plans with this device must have been uniquely sinister.
dropLocation: The Soul Splitter, any legendary end chest

name: Dracolich's Eye
description: This magically preserved eye, on a long chain, lends its sight to its wearer.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Draconic Necklace
description:
This simple golden necklace belonged to a member of the ancient order of Purple
Dragon Knights, an order heralded as heroes even before they journeyed to Shavarath
to assist the Angelic Host.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, End chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Dragonmarked Necklace
description:
This necklace is inscribed with tiny Dragonmarks, and becomes more powerful
in the hands of a Dragonmarked Heir.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Dream Collar
description: This collar belonged to a very, very good boy.
dropLocation: Beautiful Nightmares, End chest

name: Elder's Focus
description:
Tribal drow elders use these charms to focus their minds and recall past events.
They are passed down through the generations but few of them remain in existence.
dropLocation: The Last Stand, End reward

name: Elegant Diamond Necklace
description:
This necklace is infused with a powerful, benevolent energy that is able to
absorb and disperse energy drain and negative energy attacks such as those
from the spells Enervation and Harm.
dropLocation: DDO Store, Healing & Magic

name: Elyd Charm
description: This necklace seems to hum along with you.
dropLocation: Killing Time, Raid Warded Chest

name: Emerald Claw Amulet
description:
This Amulet of the Emerald Claw has been transformed by the Brother Salasso's
bloody altar.
dropLocation: The Bloody Crypt, altar

name: Emerald Claw Pendant
description:
This Pendant of the Emerald Claw has been transformed by the altars of blood
and darkness.
dropLocation: The Shadow Crypt, altar; upgraded from Emerald Claw Amulet

name: Emerald Claw Talisman
description:
This Talisman of the Emerald Claw has been transformed by the altars of blood,
darkness and damnation.
dropLocation: The Cursed Crypt, Altar; upgraded from Emerald Claw Pendant

name: Epic Adherent's Pendant
description: A consecrated pendant sealed to the followers of some forgotten deity.
dropLocation: Epic version of Adherent's Pendant

name: Epic Anchorchain
description:
A small anchor adorns the end of this chain, looped around your neck. It's too
small to weigh down any serious boat.
dropLocation: Epic version of Anchorchain

name: Epic Azure Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Epic version of Azure Necklace of Prophecy

name: Epic Crimson Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Epic version of Crimson Necklace of Prophecy

name: Epic Elder's Focus
description:
Tribal drow elders use these charms to focus their minds and recall past events.
They are passed down through the generations but few of them remain in existence.
dropLocation: Epic version of Elder's Focus

name: Epic Fanged Necklace
description: The fangs on this necklace are actually made of what appears to be quartz.
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, End chest

name: Epic Golden Cartouche
description:
A simple golden chain from which an arcane symbol hangs. It looks to be a very
old, perhaps an ancient relic brought to Xen'drik centuries ago?
dropLocation: Thrall of the Necromancer, End chest

name: Epic Golden Guile
description:
A necklace worn by a Rakshasa with links and a charm made of pure gold. It seems
to increase the wearer's ability to convince others of what he or she wants
them to believe, even making it possible to distract enemies in the midst of
a battle.
dropLocation: Epic version of Golden Guile

name: Epic Grim's Bracelet
description:
It seems one of the Grim brothers (you're not sure which one) wore this bracelet
around his wrist. Due to its size it will probably only fit you around your
neck.
dropLocation: Epic version of Grim's Bracelet

name: Epic Hruvayah's Medallion
description:
This heavy pendant bears the likeness of a many-armed woman with a serpentine
body.
dropLocation: Epic version of Hruvayah's Medallion

name: Epic Hyena Claw Necklace
description:
Made from hyena claws, this necklace imparts some of the immense fortitude of
the beast to its wearer.
dropLocation: Epic version of Hyena Claw Necklace

name: Epic Icon of Mielikki
dropLocation: Toil and Trouble, optional chest

name: Epic Lion's Mane
description: The body of a lion, hearty and proud.
dropLocation: Subversion, end chest

name: Epic Lizardfolk Tooth Necklace
description: A warning to Lizardfolk to watch their mouths around you.
dropLocation: Epic version of Lizardfolk Tooth Necklace

name: Epic Locus of Vol
description:
This amulet looks nearly identical to the symbol of Vol, with a vial of real
blood flowing in the center. Rumors persist that these ancient amulets allowed
Vol to influence her followers directly.
dropLocation: Desecrated Temple of Vol (epic), end chest

name: Epic Marguerite's Necklace
description:
This necklace is forged of interlocking black iron links. Its edges are sharp
and cut at the flesh, and it glows with a sickly light.
dropLocation: The Crypt of Gerard Dryden, end chest

name: Epic Necklace of Venom
description:
Drow assassins say this necklace is infused with Vulkoor 's subtle poisons.
Wearing it will make one's attack deft and lethal.
dropLocation: Epic version of Necklace of Venom

name: Epic Noxious Embers
description:
This small glass phial is attached to a necklace of blood red hair and filled
with the ashes of Salasso's warped and twisted heart. The phial becomes extremely
hot to the touch at times, as if something inside were trying to escape...
dropLocation: The Mark of Death, warded chest

name: Epic Pendant of Quiet Movements
description: This strange bauble seems to absorb the sound of footsteps
dropLocation: Demon Assault, end chest

name: Epic Pendant of the Black Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: Epic version of Pendant of the Black Abishai
_file: Epic Pendant of the Black Abishai.item

name: Epic Pendant of the Blue Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: Epic version of Ring of the Red Abishai
_file: Epic Pendant of the Blue Abishai.item

name: Epic Pendant of the Green Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: Epic version of Pendant of the Green Abishai
_file: Epic Pendant of the Green Abishai.item

name: Epic Pendant of the Red Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: Epic version of Pendant of the Red Abishai
_file: Epic Pendant of the Red Abishai.item

name: Epic Pendant of the White Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: Epic version of Pendant of the White Abishai
_file: Epic Pendant of the White Abishai.item

name: Epic Platinum Prayer Beads
description: "I wonder if Goldscuttle still wants these..."
dropLocation: Another Man's Treasure, End chest

name: Epic Shaman's Beads
description:
Favored by Drow shamans, necklaces such as this one are a powerful aid to spells
in combat.
dropLocation: Epic version of Shaman's Beads

name: Epic Shimmering Pendant
description:
This beautiful necklace immediately makes the wearer appear more attractive
and confident.
dropLocation: Epic version of Shimmering Pendant

name: Epic Silver Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Epic version of Silver Necklace of Prophecy

name: Epic Siren's Charm
description:
This rare charm is enchanted with the protective magic of a water spirit and
will defend the wearer from harm.
dropLocation: Epic version of Siren's Charm

name: Epic Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II
description:
An enterprising young lad with a gift from enchanting, Prince Raiyum-de created
this golden torc to aid in his studies.
dropLocation: Epic version of Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II
_file: Epic Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II.item

name: Epic Twisted Talisman
description:
The crystal on this necklace's chain glows darkly with a profane energy. It
was found near High Priestess Slikir after her defeat, and will grant the wielder
more power for his or her spells, but at a price...
dropLocation: Epic version of Twisted Talisman

name: Epic Vim and Vigor
description:
A charm representing vitality encompassed by strength, hangs from a thin titanium
chain.
dropLocation: Terminal Delirium, second bonus dance chest

name: Epic Vulkoorim Pendant
description: A golden chain holds a carved jade scorpion.
dropLocation: Epic version of Vulkoorim Pendant

name: Epic Wolf Whistle
description:
A molded metal whistle that can charm non-magical canine creatures with blasts
of ultrasonic sound.
dropLocation: Epic version of Wolf Whistle

name: Family Recruit Sigil
description: If you're in, you're in.
dropLocation: House of Pain, End chest

name: Fanciful Necklace
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Fanged Necklace
description: The fangs on this necklace are actually made of what appears to be quartz.
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, end chest

name: Finger Necklace
description: This necklace is a set of two dozen fingers, each from a different race.
dropLocation: Litany of the Dead, Mentau 's chest

name: Fleetfoot Necklace
description: It feels like you're wearing nothing at all.
dropLocation: The Curse of Strahd, End chest, Strahd Rune turn-in

name: Gilvaenor's Necklace
description:
This necklace is inscribed with arcane runes. It was worn by Gilvaenor, a renowned
Arcane Archer.
dropLocation: Genesis Point, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Golden Cartouche
description:
A simple golden chain from which an arcane symbol hangs. It looks to be a very
old, perhaps an ancient relic brought to Xen'drik centuries ago?
dropLocation: Thrall of the Necromancer, End chest

them to believe, even making it possible to distract enemies in the midst of
a battle.
dropLocation: The Lords of Dust, Marideth 's chest

name: Green Steel Necklace
description: A necklace crafted from a chunk of green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Grim's Bracelet
description:
It seems one of Grim brothers (you're not sure which one) wore this bracelet
around his wrist. Due to its size it will probably only fit around your neck.
dropLocation: A Small Problem, Brothers Grim survive chest

name: Guardian's Locket (Level 15)
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End reward

name: Guardian's Locket (Level 26)
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End reward

description:
This heavy pendant bears the likeness of a many-armed woman with a serpentine
body.
dropLocation: Chains of Flame, end chest

name: Hyena Claw Necklace
description:
Made from hyena claws, this necklace imparts some of the immense fortitude of
the beast to its wearer.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Stinkpelt 's Chest; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Hypnotic Pendant
description:
A pendant which seems to hold your attention effortlessly. It's difficult to
pull yourself away from looking at it.
dropLocation: Memoirs of an Illusory Larcener, End chest

name: Icon of Mielikki
dropLocation: Toil and Trouble, optional chest

name: Incandescent Band
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Iron Beads (historic)
description:
These beads are forged from iron and weigh bizarrely heavy in your hand. Obviously
these were meant to be worn by a giant.
dropLocation: Madstone Crater, end chest

name: Jorgundal's Collar (historic)
description:
This spike-studded collar was once worn as a ring by Jorgundal, the Master of
the Storm's Fist. It is a reminder of the stone giant's joy in the bloody clash
of armies.
dropLocation: Gianthold Tor, White Dragon 's chest

name: Key of Rhukaan Draal
description:
Forged in Darguun, this intricate silver key can open many doors... Slip it
underneath your gloves for easy access.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, end chest; Masterminds of Sharn saga: Epic end reward; rare drop in any legendary Sharn quest

name: Kilau's Necklace
description:
This thin wooden necklace belonged to the notorious Tempest, Kilaui, and is
infused with elemental energy.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Kindred Pendant
description: Man's best friend's best tool.
dropLocation: Oath of Vengeance, end chest

name: Knight's Gorget
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Legendary Conduit of the Soul
description: Tap directly into your heart.
dropLocation: House of Pain, end chest

name: Legendary Cranium Sphere
description: A small sphere with a miniature brain inside it, at the end of a long necklace.
dropLocation: The Wizard's Labyrinth, end chest

name: Legendary Crimson Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Crimson Necklace of Prophecy

name: Legendary Dawn's Herald-Charm
description: With this around your neck, you can finally rest in peace.
dropLocation: Death House, end chest

name: Legendary Dream Collar
description: This collar belonged to a very, very good boy.
dropLocation: Beautiful Nightmares, End chest

name: Legendary Elder's Focus
description:
Tribal drow elders use these charms to focus their minds and recall past events.
They are passed down through the generations but few of them remain in existence.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Elder's Focus

name: Legendary Family Recruit Sigil
description: If you're in, you're in.
dropLocation: House of Pain, End chest

name: Legendary Golden Guile
description:
A necklace worn by a Rakshasa with links and a charm made of pure gold. It seems
to increases the wearer's ability to convince others of what he or she wants
them to believe, even making it possible to distract enemies in the midst of
a battle.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Golden Guile

name: Legendary Green Steel Necklace
description: A necklace crafted from a chunk of green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Grim's Bracelet
description:
It seems one of the Grim brothers (you're not sure which one) wore this bracelet
around his wrist. Due to its size it will probably only fit you around your
neck.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Grim's Bracelet

name: Legendary Hruvayah's Medallion
description:
This heavy pendant bears the likeness of a many-armed woman with a serpentine
body.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Hruvayah's Medallion

name: Legendary Hyena Claw Necklace
description:
Made from hyena claws, this necklace imparts some of the immense fortitude of
the beast to its wearer.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Hyena Claw Necklace

name: Legendary Hypnotic Pendant
description:
A pendant which seems to hold your attention effortlessly. It's difficult to
pull yourself away from looking at it.
dropLocation: Memoirs of an Illusory Larcener, End chest

name: Legendary Kindred Pendant
description: Man's best friend's best tool.
dropLocation: Oath of Vengeance, end chest

name: Legendary Lizardfolk Tooth Necklace
description: A warning to Lizardfolk to watch their mouths around you.
dropLocation: Danger at Dunwater, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Lizardfolk Tooth Necklace

name: Legendary Lorik's Necklace
description:
This relic of the Silver Flame was supposedly once worn by the powerful cleric
Lorrik. Lorrik and his brother Levik disappeared many years ago while investigating
tales of an ancient creature residing beneath Stormreach.
dropLocation: Legendary Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Legendary Memento of Flame
description:
Estellar formed the gem at the end of this chain to remind particular patrons
of how hot a fire can truly burn.
dropLocation: Burning Down the House, end chest

name: Legendary Necklace of Bottled Sunlight
description: This tiny glass bottle contains a drop of sunlight within.
dropLocation: The Endless Revels, End Chest

name: Legendary Necklace of Venom
description:
Drow assassins say this necklace is infused with Vulkoor's subtle poisons. Wearing
it will make one's attacks deft and lethal.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Necklace of Venom

name: Legendary Night Brigade Necklace
description:
Emblazoned with a crude insignia, this lets members of the Night Brigade identify
each other.
dropLocation: Rats in a Cage, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of Apparition
description: The small gem on this chain fades away when its wearer performs magic.
dropLocation: To Curse the Sky, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of Crippling Strikes
description: This intricate necklace depicts Elven blades in miniature.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of Hardy Presence
description:
A gaudier piece more reminiscent of Dwarven craftsmanship, this pendant has
not been taken care of, but certainly makes its presence known.
dropLocation: The Zulkir's Plan, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of Hidden Tools
description:
A round pendant on a short cord hides a secret - Seeral small tools useful in
picking locks.
dropLocation: Strike Back, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of Silence
description:
Sounds are muted around this pendant, bringing either sweet quiet or maddening
silence, depending on the user's point of view.
dropLocation: The House of Gems, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of Subtle Pain
description:
Deep in the halls of the Temple, in the corners forgotten, grows a quiet torment
made manifest.
dropLocation: ToEE: Lower Temple Complex, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of the Azure Sea
description: This amulet has a twin, and seems cool to the touch.
dropLocation: Red Rain, end chest
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Azure Sea.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the Azure Sky
description: This amulet has a twin, and seems warm to the touch.
dropLocation: A Sharn Welcome, end chest
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Azure Sky.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the Black Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), End chest or Legendary version of Epic Pendant of the Black Abishai
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Black Abishai.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the Blue Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), End chest or Legendary version of Epic Pendant of the Blue Abishai
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Blue Abishai.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the Earth
description: This weighty necklace carries energy from the earth.
dropLocation: Wild Thing, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of the Green Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), End chest or Legendary version of Epic Pendant of the Green Abishai
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Green Abishai.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the Red Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), End chest or Legendary version of Epic Pendant of the Red Abishai
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Red Abishai.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the Sea
description: This weighty necklace carries energy from the ocean.
dropLocation: All Hail the King, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of the Sky
description: This weighty necklace carries energy from the sky.
dropLocation: The Stone Crypt Chronicle, end chest

name: Legendary Pendant of the Warrior's Focus
description:
The metal symbol on this chain inspires those who wear it to strike harder and
faster.
dropLocation: Creeping Death, End chest
_file: Legendary Pendant of the Warrior's Focus.item

name: Legendary Pendant of the White Abishai
description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), End chest or Legendary version of Epic Pendant of the White Abishai
_file: Legendary Pendant of the White Abishai.item

name: Legendary Raptor Teeth Necklace
description: The teeth on this necklace are razor sharp, and of quite the unusual size.
dropLocation: Dread Sea Scrolls, end chest

name: Legendary Reflective Bloodstone
description: This pendant is shimmering, shining... it's almost... hypnotic...
dropLocation: A Raven at the Door, end chest, Rescue Yesper from the Dungeons optional chest

name: Legendary Rose Quartz Sigil Stone
description:
This necklace, fashioned out of a Rose Quartz and emblazoned with a protective
rune, tingles with magical power.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, Bluto's chest

name: Legendary Rust-Laden Pendant
description:
Recently recovered from the sewers' putrid waters, this necklace has spent a
long time breaking down into its current state.
dropLocation: Kill Ten Rats, End Chest

name: Legendary Shaman's Beads
description:
Favored by Drow shamans, necklaces such as this one are a powerful aid to spells
in combat.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Shaman's Beads

name: Legendary Shimmering Pendant
description:
This beautiful necklace immediately makes the wearer appear more attractive
and confident.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Shimmering Pendant

name: Legendary Silver Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Silver Necklace of Prophecy

name: Legendary Siren's Charm
description:
This rare charm is enchanted with the protective magic of a water spirit and
will defend the wearer from harm.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Siren's Charm

name: Legendary Socket Chain
description:
This chain has sockets linked into it - Many are filled with small blue stones,
housing ardcane energy.
dropLocation: , end chest

name: Legendary Song-Chime Locket
description: When opened, little chimes play out. They remind you of home.
dropLocation: Turn the Page (quest), End chest

name: Legendary Standard Issue Sigil
description:
Marks you as a member of the Watch, or as someone's who's able to rob a member
of the Watch. Either way, it'll help you fit in.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Legendary Storna's Pendant
description:
The pendant of Storna, Leader of the Night Brigade. Her connection to Shar is
amplified out through this pendant, though those of other faiths may be able
to use it to similar effect.
dropLocation: The Darkness and the Light, end chest

name: Legendary String of Ears
description: "All the better to hear you with, my dear!"
dropLocation: Heart of the Problem, End chest

name: Legendary Thresher's Pendant
description:
A token of Thresher's appreciation - this appears to be a battleworn medal from
the Last War, scuffed and repurposed.
dropLocation: Growing Pains, end chest

name: Legendary Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II
description:
An enterprising young lad with a gift for enchanting, Prince Raiyum-de created
this golden torc to aid in his studies.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II
_file: Legendary Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II.item

name: Legendary Twisted Talisman
description:
The crystal on this necklace's chain glows darkly with a profane energy. It
was found near High Priestess Slikir after her defeat, and will grant the wielder
more power for his or her spells, but at a price...
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Twisted Talisman

name: Legendary Utilitarian Necklace
description: Sometimes a wizard's necklace is more useful than exciting.
dropLocation: Tower of Frost, end chest

name: Legendary Vulkoorim Pendant
description: A golden chain holds a carved jade scorpion.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Vulkoorim Pendant

name: Legendary War-Rune Pendant
description:
An old relic of The Last War. Runes are inscribed on nearly every available
surface, a desperate hope for the power to win. While they brought power, there
was no victory.
dropLocation: Law and Order, End chest

name: Legendary Ward-Inscribed Pendant
description: There is an odd glyph inscribed on this stone pendant.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, end chest

name: Legendary Winter Court Necklace
description: The Prince of Frost himself would grant this favor to those who impressed him.
dropLocation: A Frosty Reception, End chest, Frost Giant chest

name: Legendary Wolf Whistle
description:
A molded metal whistle that can charm non-magical canine creatures with blasts
of ultrasonic sound.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Wolf Whistle

name: Lesser Pendant of Travel
description:
This intricate pendant has semi-precious stones around the border that remind
you of the face of a fine clock.
dropLocation: DDO Store, or end reward of the Cannith Crafting Tutorial

name: Lion's Mane
description: The body of a lion, hearty and proud.
dropLocation: Subversion, end chest

name: Lizardfolk Tooth Necklace
description: A warning to Lizardfolk to watch their mouths around you.
dropLocation: Danger at Dunwater, end chest

name: Locus of Vol
description:
This amulet looks nearly identical to the symbol of Vol, with a vial of real
blood flowing in the center. Rumors persist that these ancient amulets allowed
Vol to influence her followers directly.
dropLocation: Desecrated Temple of Vol, end chest

name: Lorrik's Necklace
description:
This relic of the Silver Flame was supposedly once worn by the powerful cleric
Lorrik. Lorrik and his brother Levik disappeared many years ago while investigating
tales of an ancient creature residing beneath Stormreach.
dropLocation: Hound of Xoriat, Raid Warded chest

name: Marguerite's Necklace
description:
This necklace is forged of interlocked black iron links. Its edges are sharp
and cut at the flesh, and it glows with a sickly light.
dropLocation: The Crypt of Gerard Dryden, end chest

name: Melri's Breath
description:
This slender necklace is cold to the touch and is said to have protected its
previous wielder by shielding them with ice.
dropLocation: The Gate Chamber, End Chest

name: Memento of Flame
description:
Estellar formed the gem at the end of this chain to remind particular patrons
of how hot a fire can truly burn.
dropLocation: Burning Down the House, end chest

name: Mist Vial
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Mysterious Pendant
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Mythic Vim and Vigor
description:
A charm representing vitality encompassed by strength, hangs from a thin titanium
chain.
dropLocation: Terminal Delirium, second dance bonus chest

name: Navigator's Medallion
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Necklace of Bottled Sunlight
description: This tiny glass bottle contains a drop of sunlight within.
dropLocation: The Endless Revels, End Chest

name: Necklace of Contemplation
description:
This magical necklace gives the wearer a sense of calm, allowing them to concentrate
more easily in battle, increasing his vitality, and his ability to hit slightly.
dropLocation: Caverns of Korromar, R'zzix the Beholder and Oglethorpe the Prospector chests

name: Necklace of Fireballs
description:
A golden Necklace with a number of fiery red gems. The necklace will crumble
into dust when the last charge is expended.
dropLocation: Random, Level ~4 chests/rewards

name: Necklace of Glib Tongue (Level 12)
description:
An ancient Wizard constructed a series of these necklaces in an attempt to make
it easier to listen to the populace surrounding his tower.
dropLocation: Mimic Hunt, Turn in 80 Mimic Tokens

name: Necklace of Glib Tongue (Level 16)
description:
An ancient Wizard constructed a series of these necklaces in an attempt to make
it easier to listen to the populace surrounding his tower.
dropLocation: Mimic Hunt, Turn in 80 Mimic Tokens

description:
An ancient Wizard constructed a series of these necklaces in an attempt to make
it easier to listen to the populace surrounding his tower.

description:
An ancient Wizard constructed a series of these necklaces in an attempt to make

name: Necklace of Glib Tongue (Level 8)
description:
An ancient Wizard constructed a series of these necklaces in an attempt to make
it easier to listen to the populace surrounding his tower.
dropLocation: Mimic Hunt, Turn in 80 Mimic Tokens

name: Necklace of Mystic Eidolons
description:
These necklaces vary in appearance, but to the wearer, they always appear as
plain metal chains adorned with rock pendants. If no blood touches a detached
pendant within one turn, it dwindles away and is lost.
dropLocation: The Haunted Halls of Eveningstar, Miior or Dragon chest

name: Necklace of Tranquility
description: Grounded in reality.
dropLocation: Caged Beast, end chest

name: Necklace of Venom
description:
Drow assassins say this necklace is infused with Vulkoor's subtle poisons. Wearing
it will make one's attacks deft and lethal.
dropLocation: The Claw of Vulkoor, End reward

name: Night Brigade Necklace
description:
Emblazoned with a crude insignia, this lets members of the Night Brigade identify
each other.
dropLocation: Rats in a Cage, end chest

name: Nightforge Gorget
description: This metal collar protects its wearer's throat and neck from injury.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 10 Adamantine Ore

name: Nimble Brooch
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of an infamous scoundrel.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Noxious Embers
description:
This small glass phial is attached to a necklace of blood red hair and filled
with the ashes of Salasso's warped and twisted heart.
dropLocation: Ascension Chamber, Raid Warded chest

name: Nyoko's Necklace
description:
This thin choker was worn by Nyoko, a very talented Ninja Spy whose location
is now unknown.
dropLocation: Genesis Point, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Oremi's Necklace
description: This simple twin necklace belonged to the renowned Henshin Mystic, Oremi.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, Any End chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Pathfinder's Necklace
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a cunning woodsman.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Pendant of Apparition
description: The small gem on this chain fades away when its wearer performs magic.
dropLocation: To Curse the Sky, end chest

name: Pendant of Bottled Moonlight
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Necklace of Bottled Sunlight 

This tiny glass bottle contains a drop of moonlight within.
dropLocation: The Feywild, Feytwisted chests

name: Pendant of Combat
description: This enchanted necklace seems to glow brighter as more blood is shed.
dropLocation: The Bugbear Bandits, end chest

name: Pendant of Crippling Strikes
description: This intricate necklace depicts Elven blades in miniature.
dropLocation: Portal to Below, end chest

name: Pendant of Hardy Presence
description:
A gaudier piece more reminiscent of Dwarven craftsmanship, this pendant has
not been taken care of, but certainly makes its presence known.
dropLocation: The Zulkir's Plan, end chest

name: Pendant of Hidden Tools
description:
After fiddling with the round pendant set into this short cord, you are surprised
to discover several small tools hidden inside. Perfect for picking locks...
dropLocation: Strike Back, end chest

name: Pendant of Quiet Movements
description: This strange bauble seems to absorb the sound of footsteps.
dropLocation: Demon Assault, End chest

Deep in the halls of the Temple, in the corners forgotten, grows a quiet torment

name: Pendant of the Stormreaver
description:
This pendant once hung around the neck of the Stormreaver, messiah of the Xen'drik
giants. Wearing it causes the thunderous power of a Storm Giant to flow through
you.
dropLocation: The Fall of Truth, warded chest

name: Pendant of the Warrior's Focus
description:
The metal symbol on this chain inspires those who wear it to strike harder and
faster.
dropLocation: Creeping Death, End Chest

description: This necklace seems to be attuned to elemental power.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), optional chests

dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Periapt of Health
description: A blue gem on a silver chain.
dropLocation: Random, level ~2 chests/rewards

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
description: A brilliant cut black gem on a delicate silver chain.
dropLocation: Random, level ~5 chests/rewards

name: Periapt of Wisdom
description: A pearl pendent on a light golden chain.
dropLocation: Random, level ~4 chests/rewards

name: Platinum Prayer Beads
description: "I wonder if Goldscuttle still wants these..."
dropLocation: Another Man's Treasure, End chest

name: Poisonclasp
description: It has a subtle snakeskin pattern.
dropLocation: Treasure Hunt, end chest

name: Protector's Brooch
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a stalwart knight.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Raptor Teeth Necklace
description: The teeth on this necklace are razor sharp, and of quite the unusual size.
dropLocation: Dread Sea Scrolls, end chest

name: Rattle Charm
description:
The tail of a deadly rattlesnake worn on a simple hemp cord. Some primitive
cultures ascribe vast arcane powers to these charms.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Warded Chest

name: Reflective Bloodstone
description: This pendant is shimmering, shining... it's almost... hypnotic...
dropLocation: A Raven at the Door, end chest, Rescue Yesper from the Dungeons optional chest

name: Resonation
description: Even the slightest noises cause this small pendant to shudder.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, warded chest

name: Rose Quartz Sigil Stone
description:
This necklace, fashioned out of a Rose Quartz and emblazoned with a protective
rune, tingles with magical power.
dropLocation: White Plume Mountain, Bluto 's chest

name: Rosethorn Necklace
description: A necklace of roses by any other name would smell just as sweet.
dropLocation: Fables of the Feywild, any chest

name: Rune Lodestone
description:
The runic insignia inscribed upon this stone seems to banish all fables from
your eyes.
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Rust-Laden Pendant
description:
Recently recovered from the sewers' putrid waters, this necklace has spent a
long time breaking down into its current state.
dropLocation: Kill Ten Rats, End Chest

name: Sage's Locket (Level 15)
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End reward

name: Sage's Locket (Level 26)
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End reward

name: Scarf of Warmth
description:
A thick, woolen scarf that looks far too warm for this tropical clime, it is
imbued with magics to protect the wearer from cold.
dropLocation: Caverns of Korromar, Oglethorpe the Prospector 's chest

name: Scourge Choker
description: This necklace is made from the teeth of several dozen carcass eaters.
dropLocation: The Cursed Crypt, end chest

name: Shaman's Beads
description:
Favored by Drow shamans, necklaces such as this one are a powerful aid to spells
in combat.
dropLocation: Fathom the Depths, End reward

name: Shimmering Pendant
description:
This beautiful necklace immediately makes the wearer appear more attractive
and confident.
dropLocation: Partycrashers, Private Rooms chest, End chest

name: Shintao Cord
description:
This woven necklace was worn by the Shintao Monk, Kyosho. Its simple pattern
aided her in her meditations and allowed her to find her inner focus more easily.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Shiona's Pendant
description: This slim silver necklace once belonged to the renowned Spell Singer, Shiona.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Shroud of Ardent
description:
This small shroud is made of scraps of the banner the Abbot's body was wrapped
in. The scraps are bound together by a bowstring composed of hairs from a Nightmare.
dropLocation: The Mark of Death, warded chest

name: Shrunken Head
description: A gruesome artifact worn about the neck on a leather cord.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Sigil of Regalport
description:
Regalport, the capital city of the Lhazaar Principalities, bears this sigil
upon its banners.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, end chest; Masterminds of Sharn saga: Epic end reward; rare drop in any legendary Sharn quest

name: Sign of Xoriat
description:
This medallion is decorated with images of eyes and mouths and is unpleasantly
warm to the touch.
dropLocation: The Xorian Cipher, end chest

name: Silver Flame Amulet
description:
This amulet of the Silver Flame has been transformed by the Brother Salasso's
bloody altar.
dropLocation: The Bloody Crypt, altar

name: Silver Flame Pendant
description:
This pendant of the Silver Flame has been transformed by the altars of blood
and darkness.
dropLocation: The Shadow Crypt, altar; upgraded from Silver Flame Amulet

name: Silver Flame Talisman
description:
This Talisman of the Silver Flame has been transformed by the altars of blood,
darkness and damnation.
dropLocation: The Cursed Crypt, Altar; upgraded from the Silver Flame Pendant

name: Silver Necklace of Prophecy
description:
This glittering necklace is rumored to contain important hints of the draconic
prophecy. They rarely fall in the hands of non-dragon kind.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, warded chest

name: Siren's Charm
description:
This rare charm is enchanted with the protective magic of a water spirit and
will defend the wearer from harm.
dropLocation: Fathom the Depths, End reward

name: Skirmisher's Locket (Level 15)
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End reward

name: Skirmisher's Locket (Level 26)
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End reward

name: Smedgar's Necklace
description:
This slender necklace was worn by the Virtuoso, Smedgar. His voice, already
inspiring, obtained a near magical quality.
dropLocation: Bastion of Power, Any end chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Snare, the Chained Band
description:
A ring on a long chain. It vibrates with energy. You are exceptionally certain
that if the chain were removed, the ring would lose all power.
dropLocation: Fire Over Morgrave, end chest

name: Socket Chain
description:
This chain has sockets linked into it - Many are filled with small blue stones,
housing ardcane energy.
dropLocation: , end chest

name: Song-Chime Locket
description: When opened, little chimes play out. They remind you of home.
dropLocation: Turn the Page (quest), End chest

name: Stalwart Necklace
description:
This iron necklace was once owned by Cinder, a famous Stalwart Defender. It
has seen many battlefields, leaving it heavily scratched and scuffed.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Standard Issue Sigil
description:
Marks you as a member of the Watch, or as someone's who's able to rob a member
of the Watch. Either way, it'll help you fit in.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Stolen Necklace (Level 14)
description:
Lost to a pocket, away from it's locket, the gem was precious indeed.
Once fit for a king, of whom bards did sing, the necklace is now in need.
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, end chest (Heroic Normal); Shadow Over Wheloon, quest chain end reward (Heroic)

name: Stolen Necklace (Level 15)
description:
Lost to a pocket, away from it's locket, the gem was precious indeed.
Once fit for a king, of whom bards did sing, the necklace is now in need.
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, end chest (Heroic Hard)

name: Stolen Necklace (Level 16)
description:
Lost to a pocket, away from it's locket, the gem was precious indeed.
Once fit for a king, of whom bards did sing, the necklace is now in need.
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, End chest (Heroic Elite)

name: Stolen Necklace (Level 25)
description:
Lost to a pocket, away from it's locket, the gem was precious indeed.
Once fit for a king, of whom bards did sing, the necklace is now in need.
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, end chest (Epic Normal); Shadow Over Wheloon, quest chain end reward (Epic)

name: Stolen Necklace (Level 26)
description:
Lost to a pocket, away from it's locket, the gem was precious indeed.
 Once fit for a king, of whom bards did sing, the necklace is now in need.
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, end chest (Epic Hard)

name: Stolen Necklace (Level 27)
description:
Lost to a pocket, away from it's locket, the gem was precious indeed.
 Once fit for a king, of whom bards did sing, the necklace is now in need.
dropLocation: Friends in Low Places, end chest (Epic Elite)

name: Storna's Pendant
description:
The pendant of Storna, Leader of the Night Brigade. Her connection to Shar is
amplified out through this pendant, though those of other faiths may be able
to use it to similar effect.
dropLocation: The Darkness and the Light, end chest

name: String of Ears
description: "All the better to hear you with, my dear!"
dropLocation: Heart of the Problem, End chest

name: Subtle Amulet
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Symbol of the Shining Sun
description:
This golden amulet is the width of a man's fist, and is in the shape of a perfect,
circular sun, with twelve spokes emerging at regular intervals around the periphery.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: Clerics of the Amaunator Commendation: Clerics of Amaunator : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Clerics of Amaunator. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: The Dying Hope
dropLocation: Relentless, end chest

name: The Family's Blessing
description: You're an honorary part of the Family. Wear it with pride.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, end chest

name: The Golden Idol
description: It's mine, all mine!
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, any epic chest

name: The Harrowing Remains
dropLocation: Relentless, end chest

name: The Zarash'ak Ward
description:
The Dragon Below has followers everywhere, and a sect in Zarash'ak has forged
this Ward in its name.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, end chest; Masterminds of Sharn saga: Epic end reward; rare drop in any Sharn quest

name: Thresher's Pendant
description:
A token of Thresher's appreciation - this appears to be a battleworn medal from
the Last War, scuffed and repurposed.
dropLocation: Growing Pains, end chest

name: Torc of Prince Raiyum-de II
description:
An enterprising young lad with a gift from enchanting, Prince Raiyum-de created
this golden torc to aid in his studies.
dropLocation: Zawabi's Revenge, warded chest

name: Torin's Choker
description:
Worn by the famous Warchanter Torin, this thick golden choker looks to have
deflected several potentially fatal attacks.
dropLocation: Sins of Attrition, Any chest ; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Troubleshooter's Necklace
description: This necklace is infused with the spirit of a clever cutpurse.
dropLocation: The Salvation of Korthos, End reward

name: Twisted Talisman
description:
The crystal on this necklace's chain glows darkly with a profane energy. It
was found near High Priestess Slikir after her defeat, and will grant the wielder
more power for his or her spells, but at a price...
dropLocation: The Last Stand, End chest

name: Utilitarian Necklace
description: Sometimes a wizard's necklace is more useful than exciting.
dropLocation: Tower of Frost, End chest

name: Venn's Necklace
description:
Venn ar-Kerran never understood the magical nature of this family heirloom,
his brother Arlos did. He has offered it to you in thanks for saving his life.
dropLocation: The Lost Seekers, End reward

name: Verik's Necklace
description:
This thin chain necklace was the property of the famous Kensai, Verik. Its protection
saved him in many a duel by turning the blade of the opponent.
dropLocation: A New Invasion, Any chest; Tower of Despair, Nythirios chest

name: Vim and Vigor
description:
A charm representing vitality encompassed by strength, hangs from a thin titanium
chain.
dropLocation: Terminal Delirium, second bonus dance chest

name: Vulkoorim Pendant
description: A golden chain holds a carved jade scorpion.
dropLocation: Sands of Menechtarun, Volrune the Curate chest (Rare Encounter); Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: War Wizard's Amulet
description:
This amulet has been layered with powerful enchantments to help a War Wizard
in battle.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: War Wizards Commendation: War Wizards : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the War Wizards. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: War-Rune Pendant
description:
An old relic of The Last War. Runes are inscribed on nearly every available
surface, a desperate hope for the power to win. While they brought power, there
was no victory.
dropLocation: Law and Order, End chest

name: Ward-Inscribed Pendant
description: There is an odd glyph inscribed on this stone pendant.
dropLocation: Ravens' Bane, end chest

name: Wazul's Amulet
description: A faint whispering sound surrounds this silver necklace.
dropLocation: Stealthy Repossession, Witch Doctor Wazul 's chest

name: Winter Court Necklace
description: The Prince of Frost himself would grant this favor to those who impressed him.
dropLocation: A Frosty Reception, End chest, Frost Giant chest

name: Wolf Whistle
description:
A molded metal whistle that can charm non-magical canine creatures with blasts
of ultrasonic sound.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Den Mother Fheena 's Chest (Rare Encounter); 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Zulkash's Bone Necklace
description:
This necklace was crafted by Zulkash, Splinterskull witch-doctor. Some of the
bones appear humanoid.
dropLocation: Assault on Splinterskull, End reward
